title: Cable Sag Analysis
description: Calculate required cable pre-tension force for a specified sag.

cable_length.description: Cable Length. Symbol: L. Units: m

cable_diameter.description: Cable Diameter. Symbol: d. Units: mm

cable_final_sag.description: Target Cable Sag. Symbol: S. Units: mm. The desired sag of the cable under self-weight with Prestress Load.

density.description: Material Density. Symbol: ρ. Units: kg/m^3

elasticity_modulus.description: Elasticity Modulus. Symbol: E. Units: MPa

cable_dead_load.description: Additional Dead Load. Symbol: D_l. Units: kN/m. An additional distributed load for the entire length of the cable. The self-weight of the cable is already included automatically so this is additional to the self-weight dead load of the cable.

accuracy.description: Accuracy. Symbol: -. Units: mm. When the sag difference is less than this value, the calculation will stop.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
